product_overview: A web-based grievance management portal for admins and department staff to review, search, filter, and update student grievances. It also supports sending broadcast notifications from the admin side.
core_goals: View overall grievance status and queue summaries
Search and filter grievances to find specific cases
Update grievance resolution status and add departmental remarks

features.name: Admin Dashboard Metrics
features.description: Allows admins to quickly understand grievance workload and resolution progress from summary counts.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Observe total grievance count -> Observe pending grievance count -> Observe resolved grievance count

features.name: Admin Grievance List
features.description: Shows a table of all submitted grievances for admin review.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> View the grievance table

features.name: Admin Search Grievances
features.description: Lets admins find grievances by entering keywords and narrowing the visible list to matching records.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Enter a keyword in the search bar -> Observe the grievance list update to matching results

features.name: Admin Filter by Category
features.description: Lets admins narrow grievances by category for faster review.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Select a category -> Observe the grievance list update to matching records

features.name: Admin Filter by Status
features.description: Lets admins narrow grievances by status such as pending or resolved.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Select a status -> Observe the grievance list update to matching records

features.name: Admin View Grievance Details
features.description: Allows admins to open a specific grievance and inspect its full details.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Open a grievance's details -> Observe the detailed view or modal

features.name: Admin Update Grievance Status
features.description: Allows admins to change a grievance status from pending to resolved.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Open a grievance's status controls -> Select resolved status -> Observe the updated status in the list

features.name: Admin Broadcast Notification
features.description: Allows admins to send a broadcast message to students from the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Open the broadcast message area -> Enter a message -> Send the broadcast

features.name: Department Portal View
features.description: Shows department staff the grievances assigned to their department.
user_flows: Navigate to /department -> View the assigned grievance list

features.name: Department Grievance Update
features.description: Allows department staff to add remarks to a grievance and submit the update.
user_flows: Navigate to /department -> Open a grievance -> Enter a remark -> Submit the remark

features.name: Admin Dashboard Metrics
features.description: View total, pending, and resolved grievance counts on the admin dashboard

features.name: Admin Grievance List
features.description: View the list of all submitted grievances

features.name: Admin Search Grievances
features.description: Search for specific grievances using the search bar
user_interactions: Verify grievance list updates to match search

features.name: Admin Filter by Category
features.description: Filter the list of grievances by category
user_interactions: Select a category from the dropdown
Verify table shows only matching grievances

features.name: Admin Filter by Status
features.description: Filter the list of grievances by status (pending, resolved)
user_interactions: Select a status from the dropdown
Verify table shows only matching grievances

features.name: Admin View Grievance Details
features.description: View detailed information for a specific grievance
user_interactions: Click "View Details" on a grievance row
See detailed modal or expanded view

features.name: Admin Update Grievance Status
features.description: Update the status of a grievance from pending to resolved
user_interactions: Verify status changes in the list

features.name: Admin Broadcast Notification
features.description: Send a broadcast notification to students

features.name: Department Portal View
features.description: Load the department portal and view assigned grievances

features.name: Department Grievance Update
features.description: Add a remark or update a grievance as a department staff
